description_long: This sculpture depicts two nude human figures, a male and a female, standing closely together on an irregularly shaped base. The male figure stands with his right arm raised above his head, while the female figure faces him, her left hand gently touching his chest. Both figures are rendered in a realistic, classical style, with detailed musculature and naturalistic body proportions. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, patinated appearance, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The figures are positioned in a way that suggests interaction or intimacy, with their bodies slightly turned toward each other. The base is solid and appears to be integral to the sculpture, providing stability and support.
description: A realistic bronze sculpture of a nude man and woman standing closely together, with the man raising his arm and the woman touching his chest. The figures are detailed and lifelike, set on a solid, irregular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures facing forward, the male with his arm raised and the female reaching toward his chest.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the male figure's back and the side of the female figure, with the base visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the backs of both figures, their postures and the detailed musculature of their bodies.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view from the opposite side, showing the female's back and the male's side, with the base curving around their feet.
attribute_subject_matter: two nude human figures in a classical style
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
